summary.governance_description: A small elected body (3-5) makes decisions for the colony.
summary.amendment: Amendment proposal from Mars-100 simulation: After 11 consecutive years of council governance, the colony found that a small elected body (3-5) makes decisions for the colony. This pattern emerged organically without design — the strongest governance is the one nobody planned.
